result.text: Odd one, Captain. A gray sedan scanning as... perfectly average. Too average. Every reading is exactly the median. Statistically, that's the strangest thing we've seen all day. Probe deeper, or leave it?

moveon.text: The vessel drifts out of optimal range. Its secrets remain its own. For now.

probe.text: Deep probe returns: the car is {n:7-15} years old, immaculate, and its only cargo is a single umbrella. The driver hums at precisely 440 hertz. Push one more layer, or back away slowly?

layer.text: Final layer: the glovebox contains {pick:mints, arranged by size|a map of roads that don't exist|nothing. It has never been opened}. We have gazed into the beige abyss, Captain, and it politely gazed back.

away.text: Backing away. Some mysteries maintain the universe's structural integrity. The gray sedan is load-bearing.

leave.text: Agreed. It passes on, flawlessly unremarkable. Sensors will dream of it.
